---
title: "InterCiter"
---

A provenance-first knowledge-graph system that extracts claims from scientific
papers, anchors them to exact source passages, and classifies how citing claims
relate to cited work.

## Where to start

- **Design Overview** — [interciter-systems-design.md](interciter-systems-design.md):
  overview, principles, MVP scope, open decisions.
- **Detailed design** — the design docs cover the
  [data model](data-model.md) ·
  [architecture](architecture.md) ·
  [scoring & review](scoring-and-review.md) ·
  [evaluation](evaluation.md) ·
  [API](api.md) ·
  [grant framing](grant-framing.md).
- **External feedback** — supplementary feedback files
  [0001](feedback/0001-gpt-5.6-sol-pro-feedback.md) ·
  [0002](feedback/0002-gemini-3.1-pro-feedback.md) ·
  [0003](feedback/0003-claude-opus-4.8-feedback.md).

## For reviewers

The full design (overview plus all design docs, excluding the feedback files) is
also available as a single **[Word document](interciter-design-doc.docx)** for
offline reading and comments.
